channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP firebrand lashes out at reporter over Massie allegation: 'F--- you, first of all!'
item.description: Rep. Boebert cursed out a reporter when asked about allegations of a sexual relationship between her and Rep. Massie raised by his alleged ex.

item.title: WATCH: Mace says Trump's endorsement hasn't sealed SC gubernatorial race: 'It's a dog fight'
item.description: Rep. Nancy Mace says Trump's endorsement of Lt. Gov. Pamela Evette hasn't resonated with grassroots Republicans in South Carolina's GOP primary.

item.title: Jill Biden says former president will live with stage 4 cancer 'for the rest of his life,' has slowed down
item.description: Jill Biden says former President Joe Biden will live with stage four prostate cancer for the rest of his life, noting he has slowed down at 83.

item.title: As California Counts the Vote, Bill Essayli Bats Down Conspiracies, While CA AG Rob Bonta Furthers Them
